title: Looking for an Expert to Help Us Redo Our Monday System
excerpt:
Hi there. We’re a US-based SEO Marketing and Content Creation company. Previously, we had someone create a Monday.com system for us where we managed around 60 writers and over a million words produced a month.

posts.author: jamie_mmp (Jamie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there. We’re a US-based SEO Marketing and Content Creation company. Previously, we had someone create a Monday.com system for us where we managed around 60 writers and over a million words produced a month.

We’re looking to redo the system now in a way that’s more simplified and effective, and that resolves some ongoing issues we’ve had.

Thanks!

posts.author: andres-at-connex (Andrés at Connex)
posts.cookedHtml: Jamie, we can help. Sending you a PM

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @jamie_mmp - We would love the opportunity to discuss your business and how we can be of assistance to get you up and running on monday.com with the perfect solution.

A little about us, we are a certified monday.com implementation partner and have been helping customers in a variety of industries get up and running and also optimize their current solutions. Everything we do is monday! We are also certified in external integration programs such as Make.com (formally Integromat) to get the most out of your monday solution but also integrate seamlessly with all your other apps. Each of our Llamas are skilled in Development, Analysis, Project Management and Training.

We like to start with a complementary discovery session to go through your requirements, but also to ensure we are the best possible fit. If you would like to continue you can book your preferred time here: Book A Discovery Session - Green Llamas Consulting. If you can’t find a time that works for you feel free to let us know and we will do our very best to accommodate you personally.

Thanks!
Mark

Green Llamas

monday.com + Green Llamas

Green Llamas is here to help you make all your People and Projects Green. Let us get your herds under control using the monday.com platform.

posts.author: jamie_mmp (Jamie)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks very much for your reply! Just scheduled a call for Monday - looking forward to discussing this with you!

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @jamie_mmp ,

Glad to hear you are looking to utilize monday to its full potential!

I am sure our team at thespelas.com can help you out! At thespelas.com we’re an Official and Authorized monday partner with over 5 years of individual experience on the platform , and we count amongst our clients companies of all sizes from most industries from all around the world.

We are experts at providing customized solutions tailored to each of our client’s needs, implementing complex integrations via Make.com with any other programs you might use, creating time-saving automations and simple to understand and to use workflows.

Please do schedule a Free Consulting Session with us here so you can better explain your vision and requirements with us.

I sincerely hope our services can be of use to you!

Cheers,
Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Jamie!

monday .com supports effective redo-ing of the platform interface. This way you can structure the tool to manage your in-house marketers and writers. By modifying workflows, you can also easily keep track of varying client or workforce requests, visualize productivity, and allocate resources effectively. Moreover, setting up boards in the monday platform helps you group and categorize activities like registering client specifications, monitoring project status, and evaluating each team employee’s efficiency.

If you’re looking to redo the monday .com system, it is effective to hire monday consultants from a recognized service provider. With rich platform knowledge, consultants can redo the platform interface in a way that’s more engaging and effective and resolves existing issues.

Regards
Neelam B
Damco Solutions
Phone: +1 609 632 0350 | Email : info@damcogroup.com

posts.author: brahosatad1974 (Brooke)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve been through something similar—rebuilding from scratch felt overwhelming until I mapped out my actual workflow on paper first, then used that to build my boards. It helped cut out the fluff and keep only what we really use. A big help for structuring things was this article: Link Building for Small Businesses in 2025: Budget-Friendly Tactics That Work . It’s about link building, but the mindset applies well to building smarter systems too.
